---
name: Documentation Issue
about: Report missing, incorrect, or outdated documentation or godoc
title: "[DOCS] "
labels: documentation
assignees: ''
---

## Affected package / symbol

Name the package, type, method, or README section that has the issue.  
Example: `pkg/aruba.Client.FromNetwork()`, `README.md § Authentication`

## Issue description

Describe what is wrong, missing, or unclear.

## Suggested correction

If you know the correct information or wording, please provide it here.

## Additional context

Add any other context, links to the Aruba Cloud API reference, or screenshots here.
